description_long: This is an ornate chandelier-style sconce with five elegantly curved arms radiating from a central column, each arm supporting a candle-shaped light bulb. The fixture is suspended from a ceiling mount by a short chain, and the central column features a series of turned, decorative segments. The arms are robust and gracefully arched, ending in round, dark-colored bobeches that catch any wax drips, though the bulbs are electric. The overall finish is a muted, matte gray with contrasting black accents on the bobeches, giving it a classic yet slightly weathered appearance. The candle bulbs are white and pointed, mimicking the look of real candles. This sconce would be suitable for upscale urban interiors, such as lobbies, restaurants, or historic buildings.
description: A five-arm chandelier-style sconce with candle-shaped bulbs, matte gray finish, and black bobeches, suspended from a ceiling chain.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five arms symmetrically spread, with the central column and chain clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the curvature of the arms and the depth of the bobeches, with three bulbs more prominent.
description_view_2: Direct side view emphasizing the symmetry of the arms and the alignment of the bulbs, with the central column in profile.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view showing the rear curvature of the arms and the chain attachment, with the bulbs arranged in a semi-circle.
attribute_fixture_design: Vintage chandelier design with classic, ornate curves and a slightly weathered matte finish, evoking a traditional and elegant aesthetic.
